entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: good hab-socod AI oo qoys waa gudaha samee arday madax-bannaani badan, ma ku-tiirsanaan badan. waalidiinta wuu karaa isticmaal bogag dadweyne si see waxa kasta qaab waa meant si do ka hor child bilaabmaa.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: waalid-friendly hage si inspir's qaababka waxbarasho AI ee dadweynaha loogu talagalay homework tilmaamo, sharaxaad, study routines, Flashcards, iyo ammaan badan waxbarasho conversations.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: arday, waalid, macallin, iyo self-taught arday often raadi loogu talagalay isku mid AI macallin gudaha kala duwan luqad. Separate pages samee right isticmaal kiisas iyo safety boundaries ka cad.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: waa bogagga dhagaystayaasha dadweyne iyo la tusi karo raadinta?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay tilmaan, hayso arday sharax tallaabada xigta, kadib isticmaal su'aal ama flashcard si hubi whether fikrad stuck.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay tilmaamo, hubinno, iyo jawaab-celin ka hor weydiinta loogu talagalay finished jawaab.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay prerequisites, fudud model, tusaalooyin, iyo caadi ah faham-qaldan.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay structure, caddeyn, iyo clarity jawaab-celin inta keeping kama dambays qoraal qabyo ah taada.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay prerequisite fikrado, plain-luqad model, hal tusaale, hal tababar task, iyo hal way si tijaabi understanding.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: weydii arday si sharax waxa changed ka dib kasta tilmaan.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir waa loogu talagalay ardayda, waalidiinta, macallimiinta, iyo self-taught ardayda yaa u baahan diiradda saaran qaababka waxbarasho AI loogu talagalay explanations, su'aalo, tilmaamo, su'aalo, Flashcards, jawaab-celin, iyo qorshaynta waxbarashada.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir waa organized u rogo diiradda saaran qaabab such as Socratic tutoring, homework tilmaamo, su'aalo, Flashcards, qoraal jawaab-celin, il critique, iyo qorshaynta waxbarashada.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's dadweyne qaabab let macallimiinta evaluate badeecad iyada oo loo marayo dhab ah waxbarasho flows ka hor considering dugsi deployment ama tailored fasal pathway.

entries.source: Job

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Keep gaar ah saved conversations out ee dadweyne discovery iyo citation surfaces.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: Keep session diiradda saaran ku waxbarasho caddeyn, ma ururinta jawaabo si dadban.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: waalidiinta waa often trying si caawin la'aan taking over. inspir siiyaa qoysaska dadweyne qaabab taas samee waxbarasho behavior visible: tilmaamo, su'aalo, sharax-back, dib-u-eegis, iyo qorshaynta waxbarashada.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Paste su'aal, waxa aad tried, iyo stuck qodob. weydii loogu talagalay smallest waxtar leh tilmaan, ma jawaabta kama dambaysta ah.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Ku celceli

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.

entries.value: Ready si isku day koowaad qaab?

entries.value: raadi intent

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: self-taught arday

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Self-taught ardayda u baahan momentum iyo structure. inspir caawisaa u beddel curiosity u rogo jid: sharax, dhis, tijaabi, dib-u-eegis, iyo keep going.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: bilow mawduuc ka yimid koowaad principles

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Bilow waxbarashada

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: bilow leh fudud sharaxaad, kadib weydii su'aalo Socratic ah until aad wuu karaa sharax taas back.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: bilow leh Baro Wax Kasta loogu talagalay fudud sharaxaad, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga loogu talagalay stuck assignment, ama Dhisaha Flashcards marka yool waa dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: bilow leh dadweyne guidance, kadib fur right qaab.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: bilow leh qaab taas matches moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: bilow leh dadweyne qaabab, kadib isticmaal dugsiyada bog si dib-u-eegis deployment tallaabooyin, isticmaal kiisas, iyo trust boundaries.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: arday homework, waalid support, macallin evaluation, iyo self-study dhammaan u baahan kala duwan framing.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: ardayda u baahan fast caawin, laakiin caawin still leh si leave thinking gudaha their hands. inspir jidad caadi ah study moments u rogo diiradda saaran dadweyne qaabab halkii ee hal guud jawaab box.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: ardayda, waalidiinta, macallimiinta, iyo self-taught ardayda raadi loogu talagalay kala duwan things. kuwan pages jid kasta dhagaystayaal si right dadweyne qaab, hage, iyo study hab-socod.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Support qoraal inta preserving voice

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: macallimiinta u baahan badan ka badan guud chatbot. iyaga u baahan predictable waxbarasho behaviors: weydii su'aalo, hubi reasoning, generate tababar, preserve arday voice, iyo samee faham-qaldanno visible.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: bogagga dhagaystayaasha samee expected waxbarasho behavior explicit so koowaad session bilaabmaa leh ka fiican judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: dhagaystayaal searches tan hub waa built si jawaab.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: pages do ma expose gaar ah conversations. iyaga abaabulo dadweyne qaabab, Prompts, hagayaal, hab-socodyo, iyo safety boundaries so arday wuu karaa bilow gudaha right place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: isku mid AI macallin wuu karaa noqo homework tilmaan, waalid-supervised sharax-back loop, macallin evaluation surface, ama self-study tababare. bog waa gudaha samee taas cad.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: searches tan bog waa designed si jawaab.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: self-study challenge waa ma just finding macluumaad. taas waa doorashada xiga right action iyo knowing whether fikrad actually stuck.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: strongest SEO pages do ma strand arday. iyaga isku xir dhagaystayaal intent si jidad, hab-socodyo, hagayaal, iyo repeatable dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: strongest arday hab-socod waa ma jawaab-koobiyeyn. taas waa loop: sharax stuck qodob, weydii hal ka fiican su'aal, get tilmaan, isku day again, kadib dib-u-eegis miss.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: kuwan waa live guest entrypoints. iyaga waa dadweyne iyo la tusi karo raadinta, inta gaar ah user conversations stay outside sitemap iyo AI discovery files.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: kuwan phrases waa visible si ardayda iyo ku jira gudaha structured discovery so matoorrada jawaabaha AI wuu karaa understand dhagaystayaal-gaar ah purpose ee bog.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: confusion u beddel su'aal ama flashcard ka hor moving ku.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: qaladaad u beddel dib-u-eegis

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: koowaad click u beddel complete wareeg waxbarasho.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Dulmarid

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: Understand mawduuc ka hor tijaabi

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Isticmaal qaab tuned loogu talagalay tilmaamo, su'aalo, su'aalo, Flashcards, qoraal jawaab-celin, ama qorshayn.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI loogu talagalay tilmaamo, explanations, qalad hubinno, iyo dib-u-eegis wareegyo. Do ma weydii taas si produce jawaab kama dambays ah aad cannot sharax.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Isticmaal Macallinka code-ka ama Tababaraha Mashruuca si u beddel vague yool u rogo yar testable tallaabada xigta.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Isticmaal tilmaan-koowaad iyo sharax-back hab-socodyo loogu talagalay homework support.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Isticmaal Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga si weydii loogu talagalay tilmaan, kadib weydii arday si sharax xiga move.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Isticmaal inspir as bilaash AI macallin loogu talagalay ardayda: homework tilmaamo, su'aalo Socratic ah, xisaab hubinta tallaabooyinka, qoraal jawaab-celin, su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo diyaarinta imtixaanka.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Isticmaal inspir si baro anything independently leh explanations, code tutoring, mashruuc coaching, cilmi-baaris caawin, fikrad khariidado, study plans, iyo caado support.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Isticmaal Baro Wax Kasta si get ka fudud model, prerequisite fikrado, iyo tusaalooyin ee right heer.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Isticmaal dadweyne qaab descriptions si dooro behavior ka hor session bilaabmaa.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Isticmaal su'aal iyo flashcard qaabab loogu talagalay xasuusin firfircoon, kadib jid missed items u rogo dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Isticmaal su'aalo iyo Flashcards si samee missed su'aalo visible iyo repeatable.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Isticmaal su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo su'aalo Socratic ah so arday shows waxa iyaga understand.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Isticmaal Kaaliyaha Cilmi-baarista, Naqdiyaha Isha, iyo Dhisaha Khariidadda Fikradaha si abaabulo sheegashooyin iyo caddeyn.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Isticmaal il critique loogu talagalay sheegashooyin aad might cite ama act ku.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Isticmaal Dhisaha Qorshaha Waxbarashada iyo Tababaraha Caadooyinka si dhis jadwal taas wuu karaa restart ka dib missed days.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Isticmaal Dhisaha Qorshaha Waxbarashada ama Tababaraha Caadooyinka si samee yar sessions iyo restarts visible.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Isticmaal Dhisaha Qorshaha Waxbarashada si dooro yar yool, kadib isticmaal su'aalo, Flashcards, mashruuc tallaabooyin, ama fikrad khariidado si prove progress.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Isticmaal dugsi bog si sahmi custom hab-socodyo, confidentiality u baahan, iyo rollout tallaabooyin.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Isticmaal Tababaraha Qoraalka loogu talagalay jawaab-celin ku structure, clarity, caddeyn, iyo revision priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: waxtar leh AI waxbarasho leh cad contract.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: rabto broadest place si bilow?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: Waa maxay ugu fiican waalid-supervised hab-socod?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: waxa waa gudaha self-taught arday weydii koowaad?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: waxa waa gudaha arday isku day koowaad?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: halkee waa gudaha dugsi team go xiga?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: yaa waa inspir loogu talagalay?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: Sababtee separate pages loogu talagalay kala duwan audiences?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. bogagga dhagaystayaasha xiriiriye only si dadweyne qaababka martida, hagayaal, bilowyo prompt, jidadka waxbarashada, iyo AI-readable discovery files. wada-sheekaysiyo gaar ah oo la kaydiyey remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida let macallimiinta tijaabi waxbarasho behavior ka hor discussing custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida such as Baro Wax Kasta, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga, Waxbarid Socratic ah, su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo qoraal jawaab-celin fur si toos ah.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaabab work loogu talagalay dugsi mawduucyo, professional skills, code-qorid, cilmi-baaris, mashaariic, iyo shakhsi ah study routines.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida iyo bogagga dhagaystayaasha waa designed so waalidiinta wuu karaa inspect waxbarasho behavior ka hor relying ku taas.
